# Test Matrix Expert Skill

This skill covers choosing the right test layer in pgPacTool, including unit tests, Testcontainers
integration tests, privilege suites, package validation tests, and Linux container validation.

## Use this skill when changing
- version-specific PostgreSQL behavior
- extraction/compare/publish semantics
- package/runtime behavior
- cross-platform or native-library behavior
- CI-sensitive functionality
